use_cases: Display product category labels in e-commerce catalogs
Show status indicators for workflow states in SaaS dashboards
Present feature tags for content cards
Indicate user roles or permissions in admin interfaces
Mark items as new, featured, or promotional
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built with class-variance-authority for consistent theming. Uses standard Tailwind CSS for styling with border-transparent backgrounds and hover state transitions. Suitable as a reusable atomic component for labels, tags, and status indicators across various application contexts.
